code:
import io
import string

fn gcd(_ x: Int, _ y: Int) -> Int
  mut a = x
  mut b = y
  while b != 0
    let t = b
    b = a % b
    a = t
  end
  a
end

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)
mut a = 0
mut b = 0
mut which = 0
mut in_num = false
mut i = 0
while i < n
  mut c = 0
  match string.byte_at(input, i)
  when Some(v)
    c = v
  when None
    c = 0
  end
  if c >= 48 and c <= 57
    if which == 0
      a = a * 10 + (c - 48)
    else
      b = b * 10 + (c - 48)
    end
    in_num = true
  else
    if in_num
      if which == 0
        which = 1
      end
    end
    in_num = false
  end
  i = i + 1
end
println("gcd=#{gcd(a, b)}")
